issues.title: Missing Error Handling in Ingestion Command
issues.details: The ingestion command lacks comprehensive error handling, particularly in the upsert process. This could lead to unhandled exceptions and data loss. Suggested fix: Implement try-catch blocks around critical operations and log errors appropriately. File: .claude/commands/ingest.md:3-5.

issues.title: Potential Path Traversal in Feature Requests
issues.details: The feature request command allows for arbitrary file paths which could lead to path traversal vulnerabilities. Suggested fix: Sanitize input paths and restrict to a predefined directory structure. File: .claude/commands/features.md:10-12.

issues.title: Lack of Unit Tests for New Logic
issues.details: The ingestion command and feature request handling lack unit tests to ensure correctness. Suggested fix: Add unit tests covering various scenarios, including edge cases. File: .claude/commands/ingest.md, .claude/commands/features.md.

issues.title: Inconsistent Commit Message Format
issues.details: Commit messages do not consistently follow the defined format, which can lead to confusion in tracking changes. Suggested fix: Enforce a commit message template across the team. File: .claude/commands/handle-user-request.md:4-5.

summary: The overall code quality shows several areas for improvement, particularly in error handling, security, and testing. Addressing these issues will enhance the robustness and security of the project.
